title: File: 001 - I Need Keroro
overview: Fuyuki and Natsumi Hinata are introduced as they wake up to find a mischievous Sgt. Keroro spying on them.

title: File: 002 - Family vs Alien
overview: Fuyuki and Natsumi Hinata are captured and tied up by Keroro; Aki Hinata is introduced.

title: File 003 - Alien Surveilance
overview: Keroro has his own bedroom. Aki tasks Fuyuki with observing Keroro, who is doing his own counter-surveillance.

title: File: 004 - The Alien Cleans House
overview: Keroro helps clean the house with Natsumi and Aki, an then helps Fuyuki clean up his rather large book collection.

title: File: 005 - Keroro Platoon Formation
overview: All 5 members of the Keroro Platoon are reunited, and are tasked with rescuing Fuyuki and Natsumi from a strange alien.

title: File: 006 - Sister, Transform!
overview: Saburo uses his VR pen to transform Natsumi into Super-Natsumi, who then battles with the Keroro platoon.

title: File: 007 - Outer Space Skipping Rope
overview: Fukuki and Natsumi are skipping rope when Koyuki and Dororo appear and join the fun. Tamama and Giroro try too, and Keroro, with Kululu's help, skips rope into space.

title: File: 008 - Ticket War
overview: Fukuki wins four tickets to a spa; one for each member of his family with one extra. Koyuki and Momoka fight over which of the two would claim the extra ticket.

title: File: 009 - The New Keroro
overview: Shin Keroro appears and becomes good friends with Tomosu.

title: File: 010 - Space Game
overview: Tomosu, Fuyuki, Kaneami, Natsumi, Shin Keroro, and Keroro all play a special space game, where they are shrunk down to play as the board pieces.

title: File: 011 - Alien Sticker Battle
overview: Angol Mois and the platoon play a prank on Keroro. Kululu invents stickers that give objects and Keronians a new personality.

title: File: 012 - Space Kinder
overview: The Keroro Platoon participates in a new training regiment designed to research how Pekoponian children grow up in Kindergarten.

title: File: 013 - Dolphin and Alien
overview: Between extreme training regiments, the ARMPIT platoon takes care of a Dolphin that has the power to fly.

title: File: 014 - The Keron Stars
overview: Black Star appears and transforms into the entire Keroro platoon. Shin Keroro chases and battles him, but he vows to get his powers.

title: File: 015 - Fighting Keroro
overview: Black Star sends a Fake Keroro Platoon to challenge Keroro. Keroro quickly defeats them and impresses Shin Keroro greatly.
